title: XYZ
description: Shows overworld and nether coordinates on the HUD
body:
# Description

Shows both your overworld and nether coordinates on the HUD. While in the end it will show just the end coordinates.

You can change to "visibility mode" where the text is white by using the "Mode" keybind which can be found in the keybind settings. This is set to "Z" by default.

Note: Versions of this mod for older minecraft versions will not be maintained sorry <3

## Visibility Mode
![visibility mode](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/vkWNz53E/images/c0279ef3be784e2df4a2e311c37eaca48879efa8.png)

## Overworld
